_comment: Ahrena MCP: Notion server config. HTTP-first per lex-mcp §5. Both platforms use the official remote endpoint at mcp.notion.com/mcp; auth is per-user OAuth (browser flow on first call). Teams that prefer a shared NOTION_API_KEY (legacy npx path) override this file in .ahrena/mcp/notion.json with their justification — see codex-mcp-notion. Merged into platform MCP files during install.
